_disclaimer: UNOFFICIAL derived analytical crosswalk. References FATF Recommendation numbers/topics (not the copyright-restricted FATF text). Lists curated corpus provisions tagged with concepts relevant to each Recommendation's subject; NOT legal advice and NOT an assertion of adequate implementation. Every provision is a human-reviewed curated tag that traces to an authoritative text hash.
source: curated concept tags (scripts/concepts.py) resolved to provision labels via the structure layer
